name: Rice Pudding (Becker)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Heat milk in a saucepan over medium heat until hot but not boiling.
3. Add Butter Buds and stir until dissolved.
4. Continue heating the mixture, stirring occasionally, until it simmers gently.
5. Remove from heat and transfer to a bowl.
6. In a separate bowl, beat eggs lightly until frothy.
7. Gradually add sugar, lemon peel, vanilla, and nutmeg to the beaten eggs, whisking constantly.
8. Add this egg mixture to the milk mixture in the saucepan.
9. Stir in the uncooked brown rice and raisins.
10. Pour the pudding into a 1-quart baking dish.
11. Sprinkle additional nutmeg on top.
12. Bake for 30 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
